programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a good deal in a familiar neighbourhood in Anaheim, California. They need to act fast if they want to lock it in, but they have to make an offer without seeing the inside.

programme.title: Masters Of Flip
programme.desc: Kortney and Dave tackle a massive flip that requires a large bump out and a possible second building. As Kortney works with her team on a bright and airy design plan, Dave does everything in his power to scale down the size of the project.

programme.title: 100 Day Hotel Challenge
programme.desc: In the season finale, Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt bring back all their teammates to help tackle the hotel exteriors. Also, the Scott Brothers have help judging as they decide who takes home the bragging rights and the $50,000 charity prize!

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Blue Toes and Shower Woes in Avon, North Carolina
programme.desc: After discovering Avon, North Carolina during a beach vacation, a family of four searches for a fixer-upper. Once they've found their hidden gem, it's all hands on deck.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: Shelley Craft introduces the teams to furniture designer Mark Tuckey for their latest challenge. There's plenty of enthusiasm from the contestants who must design and create a table to be used in their apartments. First prize is $5,000 cash.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a home in Rowland Heights, California, that is jam-packed with issues including a large pool in a small backyard.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a house in Long Beach, California, with tons of potential. As work begins and problems spring up, they hope they haven't bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Small Town Potential
programme.desc: A chef and his wife look to put down roots near family in the Hudson Valley and want a home with a great kitchen and room to grow. Davina and Kristin are challenged with a modest budget and tight spaces to deliver a house that's both fun and functional.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Trading the Circus for Puerto Vallarta, Mexico
programme.desc: A former circus gymnast looks to leave the Massachusetts cold and embrace the sunshine of Puerto Vallarta, Mexico. He wants to establish a new business, so now he's under the pressure to find both a living and workspace before his nest egg runs out.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Legacy on the Line in Yucatan, Mexico
programme.desc: A longtime dream of owning a generational family compound has a couple uprooting from Texas to Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula. She envisions a picturesque beachfront home, but he wants a spacious backyard that can accommodate a growing family.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Trading Up to a House in Los Angeles
programme.desc: A real estate savvy couple look to upgrade from their condo to a single-family home in Los Angeles. They need plenty of office space, and she prefers a ranch-style house that's near family, but he wants something grand.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Anna and Edward wrestle an enormous fig tree before it forces the wedding terrace wall to come crashing down. Chris and Jolyon are in despair as they battle to turn a muddy pit into a beautiful natural pond.

programme.title: Escape To The Chateau
programme.sub-title: Escape to the Chateau at Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas at the Chateau, and the Strawbridge family is getting ready to party! This year Dick, Angel, Arthur and Dorothy celebrate their eighth Christmas in their home, and there's plenty of reminiscing as they reflect on their journe.

programme.title: Renovation Nation
programme.desc: On Humberside, Lucy and Seb make big strides to see if their sweeping staircase can be saved. And in Shropshire, Alan and Catherine cook up an al fresco living space.

programme.title: Alan Cummings: Paradise Homes
programme.desc: Alan escapes to an extraordinary waterside fantasy retreat, a sun-soaked property with endless skylights and the ultimate tranquil floating villa designed to relax anyone who enters.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Trading the Circus for Puerto Vallarta, Mexico
programme.desc: A former circus gymnast looks to leave the Massachusetts cold and embrace the sunshine of Puerto Vallarta, Mexico. He wants to establish a new business, so now he's under the pressure to find both a living and workspace before his nest egg runs out.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Legacy on the Line in Yucatan, Mexico
programme.desc: A longtime dream of owning a generational family compound has a couple uprooting from Texas to Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula. She envisions a picturesque beachfront home, but he wants a spacious backyard that can accommodate a growing family.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Trading Up to a House in Los Angeles
programme.desc: A real estate savvy couple look to upgrade from their condo to a single-family home in Los Angeles. They need plenty of office space, and she prefers a ranch-style house that's near family, but he wants something grand.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Anna and Edward wrestle an enormous fig tree before it forces the wedding terrace wall to come crashing down. Chris and Jolyon are in despair as they battle to turn a muddy pit into a beautiful natural pond.

programme.title: Escape To The Chateau
programme.sub-title: Escape to the Chateau at Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas at the Chateau, and the Strawbridge family is getting ready to party! This year Dick, Angel, Arthur and Dorothy celebrate their eighth Christmas in their home, and there's plenty of reminiscing as they reflect on their journe.

programme.title: Renovation Nation
programme.desc: On Humberside, Lucy and Seb make big strides to see if their sweeping staircase can be saved. And in Shropshire, Alan and Catherine cook up an al fresco living space.

programme.title: Alan Cummings: Paradise Homes
programme.desc: Alan escapes to an extraordinary waterside fantasy retreat, a sun-soaked property with endless skylights and the ultimate tranquil floating villa designed to relax anyone who enters.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a home in Rowland Heights, California, that is jam-packed with issues including a large pool in a small backyard.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a house in Long Beach, California, with tons of potential. As work begins and problems spring up, they hope they haven't bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Legacy on the Line in Yucatan, Mexico
programme.desc: A longtime dream of owning a generational family compound has a couple uprooting from Texas to Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula. She envisions a picturesque beachfront home, but he wants a spacious backyard that can accommodate a growing family.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Trading Up to a House in Los Angeles
programme.desc: A real estate savvy couple look to upgrade from their condo to a single-family home in Los Angeles. They need plenty of office space, and she prefers a ranch-style house that's near family, but he wants something grand.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.desc: A couple's unique, circular home boasts 360-degree windows with stunning wraparound mountain views. But the property lacks function and style. Ben and Cristi take on a challenge they've never faced before: transforming a dome into a home.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus
programme.desc: This week on The Garden Gurus, Bonnie returns with some great tips for potting your favourite varieties and has the ultimate resource for garden recovery. Trev starts his journey along the great European gardens; first stop Hungary.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: Shelley Craft introduces the teams to furniture designer Mark Tuckey for their latest challenge. There's plenty of enthusiasm from the contestants who must design and create a table to be used in their apartments. First prize is $5,000 cash.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Trading the Circus for Puerto Vallarta, Mexico
programme.desc: A former circus gymnast looks to leave the Massachusetts cold and embrace the sunshine of Puerto Vallarta, Mexico. He wants to establish a new business, so now he's under the pressure to find both a living and workspace before his nest egg runs out.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Legacy on the Line in Yucatan, Mexico
programme.desc: A longtime dream of owning a generational family compound has a couple uprooting from Texas to Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula. She envisions a picturesque beachfront home, but he wants a spacious backyard that can accommodate a growing family.

programme.title: Australia's Best Pools
programme.desc: Dave is in Adelaide to see a family pool that has everything, Dave gives you a close look into one of his own designs and Dave coins a Mobster pool that is unique, massive and with lots of tiny details.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a home in Rowland Heights, California, that is jam-packed with issues including a large pool in a small backyard.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a house in Long Beach, California, with tons of potential. As work begins and problems spring up, they hope they haven't bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Alan Cummings: Paradise Homes
programme.desc: Alan escapes to an extraordinary waterside fantasy retreat, a sun-soaked property with endless skylights and the ultimate tranquil floating villa designed to relax anyone who enters.

programme.title: Renovation Nation
programme.desc: On Humberside, Lucy and Seb make big strides to see if their sweeping staircase can be saved. And in Shropshire, Alan and Catherine cook up an al fresco living space.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Anna and Edward wrestle an enormous fig tree before it forces the wedding terrace wall to come crashing down. Chris and Jolyon are in despair as they battle to turn a muddy pit into a beautiful natural pond.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: Keith puts the pressure on everyone to work harder in the communal area. Steve steps outside his comfort zone and goes shopping on his own for the first time. He and Chantelle think they have this week's secret room-winning formula.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina return to the street of a previous flip in Cypress, California, when they can't agree on a design for the kitchen, they decide to settle matters with a quick game of hoops.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Hosts Tarek and Christina purchase a tri-level house to flip in the city of Irvine, Calif., sight unseen, and then they open its small kitchen and update the master bedroom while attempting to stay within their limited budget.

programme.title: Escape To The Chateau
programme.sub-title: Escape to the Chateau at Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas at the Chateau, and the Strawbridge family is getting ready to party! This year Dick, Angel, Arthur and Dorothy celebrate their eighth Christmas in their home, and there's plenty of reminiscing as they reflect on their journe.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Puerto Vallarta Rent vs. Buy, Oh My
programme.desc: A young family leaves San Francisco to move to her dream locale of Puerto Vallarta, Mexico. She wants a turnkey property to ensure an easy transition, but with a hot real estate market, they may have to consider renting over buying to get settled fast.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Texas man convinces his husband to put their lives on hold and move to Maidstone, England. They're looking for a place big enough to accommodate their three kids, but navigating the differences between Texas and European real estate may be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A couple is under a time crunch to find a home before their wedding and his relocation benefits expire in Bloomington, Illinois. She wants an affordable fixer to save for their big day, but he wants to spend big.

programme.title: Home Town Takeover
programme.desc: For their final takeover task, Ben and Erin help heal the tornado-damaged part of Wetumpka by breaking ground on a farmers market overlooking the Coosa River. Then, Jasmine Roth and Ty Pennington pitch in to restore a 130-year-old landmark's former glory.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen have high hopes for turning their mostly demoed house on Palmer Street into a moody Cape Cod-style masterpiece. As the project develops, unforeseen problems begin to emerge that may make this family home a major catastrophe.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are back in Old Southside where they've purchased a hoarder house filled with garbage and hiding fire damage. As demo gets underway, they uncover a slew of other issues as they turn this trash-filled home into an updated Victorian beauty.

programme.title: The Nate And Jeremiah Home Project
programme.desc: Nate and Jeremiah help a couple begin their next chapter together as they update their first home with a rich design palette.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Texas man convinces his husband to put their lives on hold and move to Maidstone, England. They're looking for a place big enough to accommodate their three kids, but navigating the differences between Texas and European real estate may be a challenge.

programme.title: Home Town Takeover
programme.desc: For their final takeover task, Ben and Erin help heal the tornado-damaged part of Wetumpka by breaking ground on a farmers market overlooking the Coosa River. Then, Jasmine Roth and Ty Pennington pitch in to restore a 130-year-old landmark's former glory.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen have high hopes for turning their mostly demoed house on Palmer Street into a moody Cape Cod-style masterpiece. As the project develops, unforeseen problems begin to emerge that may make this family home a major catastrophe.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are back in Old Southside where they've purchased a hoarder house filled with garbage and hiding fire damage. As demo gets underway, they uncover a slew of other issues as they turn this trash-filled home into an updated Victorian beauty.

programme.title: The Nate And Jeremiah Home Project
programme.desc: Nate and Jeremiah help a couple begin their next chapter together as they update their first home with a rich design palette.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina return to the street of a previous flip in Cypress, California, when they can't agree on a design for the kitchen, they decide to settle matters with a quick game of hoops.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Hosts Tarek and Christina purchase a tri-level house to flip in the city of Irvine, Calif., sight unseen, and then they open its small kitchen and update the master bedroom while attempting to stay within their limited budget.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Texas man convinces his husband to put their lives on hold and move to Maidstone, England. They're looking for a place big enough to accommodate their three kids, but navigating the differences between Texas and European real estate may be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A couple is under a time crunch to find a home before their wedding and his relocation benefits expire in Bloomington, Illinois. She wants an affordable fixer to save for their big day, but he wants to spend big.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Blue Toes and Shower Woes in Avon, North Carolina
programme.desc: After discovering Avon, North Carolina during a beach vacation, a family of four searches for a fixer-upper. Once they've found their hidden gem, it's all hands on deck.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus
programme.desc: On this week's episode of the Garden Gurus, Trevor continues his journey through European Gardens, with Viking. Back in AUS, Bonnie gives you her Top 5 Waterwise Plants for your garden, plus great potting ideas and techniques.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: Keith puts the pressure on everyone to work harder in the communal area. Steve steps outside his comfort zone and goes shopping on his own for the first time. He and Chantelle think they have this week's secret room-winning formula.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Puerto Vallarta Rent vs. Buy, Oh My
programme.desc: A young family leaves San Francisco to move to her dream locale of Puerto Vallarta, Mexico. She wants a turnkey property to ensure an easy transition, but with a hot real estate market, they may have to consider renting over buying to get settled fast.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Texas man convinces his husband to put their lives on hold and move to Maidstone, England. They're looking for a place big enough to accommodate their three kids, but navigating the differences between Texas and European real estate may be a challenge.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina return to the street of a previous flip in Cypress, California, when they can't agree on a design for the kitchen, they decide to settle matters with a quick game of hoops.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Hosts Tarek and Christina purchase a tri-level house to flip in the city of Irvine, Calif., sight unseen, and then they open its small kitchen and update the master bedroom while attempting to stay within their limited budget.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen have high hopes for turning their mostly demoed house on Palmer Street into a moody Cape Cod-style masterpiece. As the project develops, unforeseen problems begin to emerge that may make this family home a major catastrophe.

programme.title: The Nate And Jeremiah Home Project
programme.desc: Nate and Jeremiah help a couple begin their next chapter together as they update their first home with a rich design palette.

programme.title: Home Town Takeover
programme.desc: For their final takeover task, Ben and Erin help heal the tornado-damaged part of Wetumpka by breaking ground on a farmers market overlooking the Coosa River. Then, Jasmine Roth and Ty Pennington pitch in to restore a 130-year-old landmark's former glory.
